settings.stepWebApp: Choose "Web Application" as the application type
settings.stepFillCredentials: Fill in the Client ID and Client Secret below
settings.stepRegisterRedirect: Add the Redirect URI shown below to the "{section}" list
settings.stepEnabled: Enable this plugin in Plugin Management; the login page will then show a "{label}" button
settings.clientSecretHelp: Leave blank to keep the current secret; enter the full Client Secret to update it.
settings.redirectUriHelp: Generated from the current site and read-only. Register this full URL in the "{section}" list.
settings.defaultRedirectHelp: When login succeeds and no SSO rule matches, the SPA navigates to this landing page (default /dashboard).
settings.enableSsoHelp: When enabled, an OAuth entry with a state matching a rule below delivers accessToken/refreshToken as query parameters to that external URL instead of entering the SPA. Empty or unmatched state uses the default redirect after login.
settings.rulesTitle: SSO token delivery rules (state → external URL)
settings.rulesEmpty: No SSO rules are configured. Default login uses the default redirect after login and will not trigger SSO delivery.
settings.rulesHelp: The page serializes these rules into JSON for the backend. Unmatched state uses the default redirect after login.

google.loginDescription: Click below to start the Google login flow. The plugin will redirect you to Google for authorization and then bring you back to the workbench.

discord.loginDescription: Click below to start the Discord login flow. The plugin will redirect you to Discord for authorization and then bring you back to the workbench.
